phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar queijada de amêndoa aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR kay-ZHAH-duh DIH uh-MAYNG-doouh uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao balcão ou ao garçom por sugestões locais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bahl-KOWN OHW OW guh-ruh-SOHNG POOR soo-zhihsh-TOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the counter attendant or waiter for local suggestions.

responses.english: Ask the counter attendant or waiter for local suggestions.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bahl-KOWN OHW OW guh-ruh-SOHNG POOR soo-zhihsh-TOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao balcão ou ao garçom por sugestões locais.

likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the cashier.

responses.english: You can pay at the cashier.
